---
title: "Dorsum_environment"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-11"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r prep data, echo = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")


avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_allpop_avgimg_wide.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
asy <- avg_img %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY", ID != "614283")
# lum is wrong but need to go back to source files

```

## Does location predict color ? 

```{r lat vs dorsum, echo = F}

#perform linear regression
z <- lm(dblMean_d~lat, data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
sum_z <- summary(z)

# Extract the r^2 and p-value
r2adj <- sum_z$adj.r.squared
p_value <- sum_z$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# Format the text to include rho and p-value, ready to be used in annotations
text_annotation <- bquote("Adjusted R"^2 ~ ": " ~ .(sprintf("%.2f", r2adj)) ~ ", p-value: " ~ .(sprintf("%.3f", p_value)))


ggplot(data = asy, aes(x = lat, y = dblMean_d)) + 
  geom_point(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Latitude", y = "Luminance (brightness)") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = lat, y = dblMean_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  theme_classic() +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

```

# Build model for env-dorsum correlation

```{r climNA, echo = F}

library(car)
library(performance)

# combine w environment data  
env <- read.table(here("data/Env_by_individual_specimen_samples.txt"), header = T)

lum_env <- merge(asy, env)

z <- lmer(dblMean_d ~ Tave_sm+ PPT_sm + qscat + ndvi_M + srtm + lat + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor) + (1|pop), data = lum_env)


check_model(z)
vif_values <- vif(z)

# Visualizing VIF
barplot(vif_values, col = "skyblue", main = "Variance Inflation Factor (VIF)")

compare_performance(z)

# Visualizing the model
plot(z, which = 1, main = "Model Fit")

```


```{r lmm pheno-env, echo = F}

library(lmerTest)
library(MASS)
library(MuMIn)
library(performance)
library(sjPlot)

# combine w environment data  
env <- read.table(here("data/Env_by_individual_specimen_samples.txt"), header = T)

lum_env <- merge(asy, env)


z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_d ~ bio_10 + bio_18 + srtm + qscat + ndvi_M + lat + 
                      (1|Year) + (1|prepartor) + (1|pop),
                    data = lum_env)


check_model(z)
summary(z)
tab_model(z)


#dredge(z)

#removing random factors and bio8 bc I don't trust it
norand <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(-pop, -Year, -prepartor, -ID, -bio_8)
# stepwise model selection
options(na.action = "na.fail")
full <- lm(dblMean_d ~., data = norand) 

#using dredge 
z <- dredge(full, rank = "AICc")
print(z)                                  # Model selection table
print(z[z$delta < 5])                     # Tabulate only models with AIC difference < 5
Weights(z)                                # AIC weights all models
Weights(z[z$delta < 5])                   # Include only models with AIC difference < 5
get.models(z, subset=delta<5)             # Extract the models having AIC difference < 5
get.models(z, subset = 1)[[1]]            # Extract single best model (yields lm object)

z <- lm(get.models(z, subset = 1)[[1]], data = mydata) # Fit best model
summary(model.avg(z, subset = delta < 2))              # model averaging




z <- stepAIC(z, direction="both")

summary(z)
plot(z)
anova(z)
logLik(z) # include df
AIC(z)    # AIC score


```

```{r lmm climNA pheno-env, echo = F}

library(lmerTest)
library(MASS)
library(MuMIn)
library(performance)


# including bio 10 (mean temp warmest quarter), bio18 (mean precip warmest quarter), elev

lumenv_sel <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(pop, Year, prepartor, dblMean_d, PPT_sm, PPT_sp, Tave_sm, Tave_sp, srtm, lat, lon) %>% 
  na.omit()

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_d ~ PPT_sm + PPT_sp + Tave_sm + Tave_sp + srtm + lat +  (1|pop), data = lumenv_sel)


check_model(z)
summary(z)

dredge(z)


```


```{r plot}

# combine w environment data  
env <- read.table(here("data/Env_by_individual_specimen_samples.txt"), header = T)

lum_env <- merge(asy, env)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = bio_10, y = dblMean_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Mean Temperature of Warmest Quarter", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = bio_10, y = dblMean_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(dblMean_d~ bio_10, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = ndvi_M, y = dblMean_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Max NDVI", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = ndvi_M, y = dblMean_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(dblMean_d~ ndvi_M, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = bio_18, y = dblMean_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Precip of Warmest Quarter", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = bio_18, y = dblMean_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(dblMean_d~ bio_18, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = srtm, y = dblMean_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Elevation", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = srtm, y = dblMean_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(dblMean_d~ srtm, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

```
